# infinity_role

Manages a role configuration with the Infinity service. Roles define sets of permissions that can be assigned to users or applications.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_role" "example" {
  name = "Conference Manager"
  permissions = [
    "conference.create",
    "conference.read", 
    "conference.update",
    "conference.delete"
  ]
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the role. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `permissions` (Set of String) List of permissions assigned to this role.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the role
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the role


## Import

Roles can be imported using their resource ID:

```bash
terraform import pexip_infinity_role.example 123
```
